CVE-2019-17455.title: Libntlm through 1.5 relies on a fixed buffer size for tSmbNtlmAut ...
CVE-2019-17455.description: Libntlm through 1.5 relies on a fixed buffer size for tSmbNtlmAuthRequest, tSmbNtlmAuthChallenge, and tSmbNtlmAuthResponse read and write operations, as demonstrated by a stack-based buffer over-read in buildSmbNtlmAuthRequest in smbutil.c for a crafted NTLM request.
